Localization.Description: A Textcons session was opened or ended

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} ended a Text-Based Remote Console (Textcons) session on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} opened a Text-Based Remote Console (Textcons) session on host {event_src.host}
